quick question, what is the significance of the black pool again?
doing ch5 and keeper said straying from the black pool can cause awakeners to go frenzy
the black pool contains a giant piece of silver which can be used as a dummy link for mythags awakeners when they're not linked with anyone else
the actual requirement for a link is a certain degree of "spiritual aptitude", nothing much beyond that.
typically a person can only link with one awakener at a time. the playable keeper is an exception
